commands:
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'python - <<"PY"
import json
with open("/home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/frontend/site_config.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    c = json.load(f)
print(c.get("db_host", ""))
print(str(c.get("db_port", 3306)))
print(c.get("db_name", ""))
print(c.get("db_user", ""))
print(c.get("db_password", ""))
PY' > /tmp/frontend-db-vars.txt

docker exec -e DB_HOST="$DB_HOST" -e DB_PORT="$DB_PORT" -e DB_NAME="$DB_NAME" -e DB_USER="$DB_USER" -e DB_PASS="$DB_PASS" frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'mysql --version; mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u erpnext -p"AtlasLakesAws123!" -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS \\`$DB_NAME\\` CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS \\`$DB_USER\\`@\\`%\\` IDENTIFIED BY \\'$DB_PASS\\'; ALTER USER \\`$DB_USER\\`@\\`%\\` IDENTIFIED BY \\'$DB_PASS\\'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON \\`$DB_NAME\\`.* TO \\`$DB_USER\\`@\\`%\\`; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"'
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site frontend migrate'
